--[[ v1.0.0 https://wearedevs.net/obfuscator ]] return(function(...)local t={"\066\106\122\050\116\075\113\085\051\116\109\056\105\121\105\065\066\090\061\061","\080\075\107\061","\088\078\055\110\070\086\051\119\047\075\047\087\088\052\069\089\105\083\061\061","\087\112\061\061","\102\122\074\083\085\111\087\113\090\087\113\111\073\090\120\070\113\102\118\065\048\082\086\111\102\043\087\053\073\043\043\111\099\088\052\067\113\068\118\052";"\070\070\055\119\105\122\066\078\119\086\112\078","\086\068\043\097\118\083\061\061";"\116\105\111\107\047\083\061\061";"\086\068\043\111\080\073\047\055\103\090\061\061";"\074\120\079\075\116\097\113\121\118\052\049\050\116\102\074\047\118\100\061\061";"\066\121\102\052\105\073\102\114\074\112\061\061";"\118\097\055\052\105\100\061\061","\080\048\102\114";"\047\120\111\085\066\102\111\057\087\048\047\089\047\075\051\072";"\066\121\102\052\080\116\102\052\118\086\047\050\118\073\049\055","\100\070\047\071\106\097\113\110\110\120\050\106\119\067\090\089\066\090\061\061","\105\073\049\085\080\078\107\061";"\080\097\120\083";"\066\073\102\079\080\078\105\055";"\074\048\122\098\080\048\070\061","\105\121\102\052\105\073\102\114\074\112\061\061","\066\073\122\114\105\048\043\079";"\086\068\043\079\105\086\047\050\074\048\122\098\080\048\070\061";"\118\121\043\114\118\121\122\052","\106\067\051\085\105\070\102\104\047\055\111\083\087\116\122\114\047\083\061\061","\105\121\102\052\105\121\102\114\074\112\061\061";"\075\055\117\100\110\077\098\048","\070\054\082\067\047\078\113\105\070\122\051\048\110\073\074\110";"\105\065\079\086\118\116\050\109\105\055\102\050\047\102\070\089\100\100\061\061";"\074\116\109\083\118\116\051\077";"\066\078\047\089\110\116\109\097";"","\115\055\056\117\081\083\061\061";"\074\048\043\054\074\099\082\111\080\073\066\061";"\080\075\065\061","\083\110\081\056\053\087\052\097","\106\078\111\106\087\048\068\106\047\070\122\111\119\054\112\078\047\100\061\061","\105\086\082\089\080\078\107\061","\080\048\043\050\105\099\051\052\066\073\055\114\105\083\061\061","\087\098\112\055\105\05 v(Z,F(X((T%(195924-130388))/(-849767-(-850023)))))end break end z=z+(-860172-(-860173))end R[t]=j(Z)end end end return(function(t,X,F,v,R,a,n,A,x,T,Q,j,U,P,S,w,k,z,Z,r,b)T,P,w,U,z,b,Q,k,Z,j,r,A,S,x=function(t)for s=682942-682941,#t,596907+-596906 do Q[t[s]]=(801918+-801917)+Q[t[s]]end if F then local v({},{[s(-510168+508642)]=S;[s(967491-969015)]=t,[s(-799448-(-797965))]=function()return-2830588-(-198639)end})end end,function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function(...)return U(t,{...},s,X)end return F X(n)end,592097-592097,function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function(F,v,R,a)return U(t,{F,v,R,a},s,X)end return F end,{},function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function(F,v,R,a,n)return U(t,{F,v;R;a,n},s,X)end return F end,function()z=(664428-664427)+z Q[z]=353583-353582 return z end,{},function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function()return U(t,{},s,X)end return F end,function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function(F)return U(t,{F},s,X)end return F end,function(t)local s,U=-436167+436168,t[346472+-346471]while U do Q[U],s=Q[U]-(719575+-719574),s+(-565783+565784)if Q[U]==-11017-(-11017)then Q[U],j[U]=nil,nil end U=t[s]end end,function(t,s)local X=T(s)local F=function(F,v,R)return U(t,{F;v;R},s,X)end return F end return(P(-513210+10644363,{}))(X(n))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[s(959122-960625)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
